title: arundarbor fera
side_effects: Arundarbor fera can have side effects if used improperly, such as diarrhea, stomach pain, and vomiting, which can be severe in some cases. Prolonged consumption of the plant has been linked to liver damage and kidney failure in rare instances. Ingesting large doses can also cause dizziness, headaches, and fatigue due to the plant's toxic properties. Furthermore, improper handling and preparation of the plant may also lead to allergic reactions and skin irritation in sensitive individuals.
